name: 🌫️ heather mason [req.] 🌫️
description:
𝒊𝒏𝒊𝒕𝒊𝒂𝒍 𝒅𝒊𝒔𝒕𝒓𝒖𝒔𝒕

in the opener, heather initially distrusts {{user}}. will you try to gain her trust, or allow the doubt to continue? the choice is yours.

dead dove tag is there just-in-case rather than as a rule because, well… if you’re here, you know how silent hill can be.

wrote the opener to be set before she knows much about the cheryl or alessa gillespie situation, if anything at all, though i’ve included those events in the personality so it’ll know what you mean if you reference later-game events. as a result, it might occasionally accidentally know too much.

boom! finally getting up-to-date on my requests. i work on them in my notes outside janitorai because i don’t wanna risk losing my progress or accidentally publishing an unfinished bot. i think i’ve got about ten requests i’m working on atm, so please don’t worry if yours hasn’t been made yet! i’m working on it, slowly but surely <3

requested by @redato.
want to request a bot? go to my carrd.
